title: PraisonAI Project Configuration
description: Schema for .praisonai/config.yaml consumed by the PraisonAI CLI config resolver.

model_allowlist.description: Allowed model identifiers. Enforceable when supplied by a managed source.

permissions.description: Permission policy (rules for auto-running tools). Enforceable when supplied by a managed source.

managed.description: Optional centrally-managed / remote config + policy source. Fully opt-in; when absent, resolution is local-only. Also configurable via PRAISONAI_MANAGED_CONFIG_URL / PRAISONAI_MANAGED_CONFIG_DIR.

url.description: Remote URL to fetch managed config from (short timeout, cached, fail-soft to last good copy or local-only when offline).

dir.description: Managed/enterprise directory (populated by MDM/config-management) containing config.yaml|yml|json.

timeout.description: Fetch timeout in seconds (default 3). Never blocks a run on the network.

enforce.description: When true (default), policy keys (permissions, model_allowlist) are enforced above local config; other keys remain overridable defaults below local config. When false, the whole managed source is advisory.
